title: clerodendrum micans
intro: Clerodendrum micans, also known as the Dainty Clerodendrum or Variegated Glory Bower, is a flowering plant native to tropical Asia and is characterized by its attractive variegated leaves and delicate white flowers. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The leaves and stems of Clerodendrum micans have been used in traditional medicine to promote health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be made from the leaves, stems, and roots of the plant.
